chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR Cr. Bail App. No. S – 947 of 2025 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge Hearing of post-arrest bail 1. For orders on office objections at Flag-A 2. For hearing of post-arrest bail 27.10.2025 Mr. Muhammad Ali Napar, Advocate for applicant. Mr. Khalil Ahmed Maitlo, Deputy Prosecutor General..-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.- Learned Counsel for the applicant requires the present bail application to be disposed of as not pressed, as according to him, complainant has been examined on 21.10.2025, wherein fresh grounds are available to him. Accordingly, present bail application stands disposed of as not pressed. J U D G E Abdul Basit
